_schema.doc: Canonical SC set list. set_id is the Tencent-internal numeric id from PTCG-CHS-Datasets/ptcg_chs_infos.json:collections[].id (string-typed). abbreviation is commodityCode. jp_equivalent_id maps to JP set codes from pokemon-card-jp-database. release_date is ISO 8601. Unknown fields use the literal string "VERIFY" until an operator confirms.
_schema.auto_refresh: ZH-4 (zh_set_audit) will re-derive this file from PTCG-CHS-Datasets/ptcg_chs_infos.json on each run; manual edits to existing entries will be preserved when jp_equivalent_id is non-VERIFY (operator-confirmed) but new collections from upstream will be appended.

sets.name_zh_sc: 30周年庆典 最初的伙伴特别插画闪卡套装 Vol.1
